{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201621513FD1C361EFB5D6C25300\"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565791679153849150","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以历史发展为线，将各个时代的重要事件、历史人物串联起来，条理清晰、人物形象刻画细致入微！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761551511,"group_id":"7535081324982307864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzEWplES0sshsG2zUHJszqD+TaSErD3PEbPs29yQOffY","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4063396127584624","user_name":"爱吃罗汉果水的炎阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4063396127584624","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7535081324982307864","book_info":{"abstract":"滚滚长江东逝水，浪花淘尽英雄。金銮殿的琉璃瓦映着千年日光，他们曾是掀翻天地的手——嬴政挥剑斩断分封的锁链，李世民在玄武门前踏碎兄弟骨血，赵匡胤杯酒释兵权时指尖的温度，朱元璋剥皮实草时眼底的寒霜。王座是熔金的炉，烧尽了少年意气，也炼出了权衡天下的铁腕：有的帝王用雷霆手段治世，让白骨在长城下垒成地基；有的用柔术安邦，让文墨在史书里绣出太平。接下来，我将用我对历史的理解，加以幽默风趣加以现代的思维对历史上的那些人、那些事展开聊聊！我也不知道能写多久，就这么着吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ff289a09ee2eda631a8e0bc145ace12","author":"令狐楼主","author_id":"","book_id":"7535081324982307864","book_name":"二十四史原来这么有趣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5488人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":31,\"name\":\"其他\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=31\u0026name=其他\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7535081427684033048","read_count":"5488","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2205826"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"485","tags":"其他","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0b162f5deb3a308fe1e87a2a35785b11~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178911\u0026x-signature=NBS8FE51XAqNmNPbBk3UKQTamvY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3074656486824333","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"164"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201621513FD1C361EFB5D6C25300\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":112244,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116291,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":534},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1761647215,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594693297199481625","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以新的视角，回顾二十四史，多了些不同感受！","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"二十四史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%BA%8C%E5%8D%81%E5%9B%9B%E5%8F%B2\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773994911D6C25300%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594693297199481625%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227535081324982307864%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%8C%E5%8D%81%E5%9B%9B%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768280652,"group_id":"7535081324982307864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":
